subcodes.first_line: The horizon of bounty hath verily dawned, yet the peoples have turned away therefrom, having followed every graven idol that hath been raised up [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد لاح افق الکرم ولکن الامم اعرضوا عنه بما اتبعوا کل صنم منحوت قد ارتفع
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @predictions and prophecies, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
